description_long: This is a large, modern Mediterranean-style house with a white stucco exterior and flat roofs. The front features a grand staircase flanked by tall, manicured cypress trees leading to a prominent entryway. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, palm trees, and a landscaped patio area surrounded by a low fence. Multiple terraces and balconies are visible, some with outdoor seating and pergolas. The windows are arranged in a mix of symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with several large and small rectangular panes. The property is lushly landscaped with hedges, shrubs, and decorative planters, giving it a luxurious and inviting appearance.
description: A large, white Mediterranean-style house with flat roofs, grand entry stairs, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and palm trees. The design includes terraces, balconies, and a mix of window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grand staircase, main entryway, and symmetrical cypress trees lining the approach.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, cypress trees, and the transition to the backyard with visible pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, palm trees, patio, and multiple terraces overlooking the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's depth, additional cypress trees, and the landscaped backyard with pool and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of large and small rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Grand staircase with flanking cypress trees, prominent central door, and minimal overhang
